products formulas
			
modelPortfolios  =   all from  portfolioData [838 records]   where   portfolioLevel [838 values]  ==  4   =  [324 records]
preAllocationActualValue  =   default
		(
		 sum
		(
		 @children . preAllocationActualValue FILGV MNA.preAllocationActualValue 0.00 EUR  FILGV MND3.preAllocationActualValue 54,541,181.58 EUR  FILGV MND.preAllocationActualValue 8,163,405,687.00 EUR   
		)
	  ,  zero 0.00 EUR  
		)
	  =  8,217,946,868.58 EUR
actualValue  =   default
		(
		 sum
		(
		 @children . actualValue FILGV MNA.actualValue 0.00 EUR  FILGV MND3.actualValue 54,541,181.58 EUR  FILGV MND.actualValue 8,163,405,687.00 EUR   
		)
	  ,  zero 0.00 EUR  
		)
	  =  8,217,946,868.58 EUR
hasLiquids  =   has
		(
		 all from  modelPortfolios [324 records]   where    contains
		(
		 current   ,  @ancestors [324 values]  
		)
	 and  not
		(
		 isIlliquid [3 values]  
		)
	 and  not
		(
		 isMatchingModelPortfolio [3 values]  
		)
	  
		)
	  =  true
bandwidthRelativeWeight  =    actualValue 8,217,946,868.58 EUR  /  @parent . actualValue Rentegedreven matching.actualValue −1,745,043,652.42 EUR    =  −4.7093
benchmarkWeightAllocation  =    benchmarkBandwidth 0.1600 [#3] 
		[  "weight" ]
	  =  16.000%
benchmarkWeightAllocation_calc  =   default
		(
		 benchmarkWeightAllocation 16.000%   ,    @parent . benchmarkBandwidth Rentegedreven matching.benchmarkBandwidth undefined  
		[  "weight" ]
	 ×  bandwidthRelativeWeight −4.7093  
		)
	  =  0.1600
portfolio  =   single from  @ancestors [5 records]  where   portfolioLevel [5 values]  ==  1  =  22
initialWeight  =    preAllocationActualValue 8,217,946,868.58 EUR  /  portfolio . preAllocationActualValue Matching.preAllocationActualValue 33,069,024,996.50 EUR    =  0.2485
factualWeight  =    actualValue 8,217,946,868.58 EUR  /  portfolio . actualValue Matching.actualValue 33,069,024,996.50 EUR    =  24.851%
deviation  =    factualWeight 24.851%  −  benchmarkWeightAllocation_calc 0.1600   =  8.851%
isEligible  =   default
		(
		   hasLiquids true  and   initialWeight 0.2485  >  0 and  
		(  isProductGroup false  or  not
		(
		 isOverlay false  
		)
	)
	  ,  false 
		)
	  =  true
isMatchEligible  =     deviation 8.851%  !=  zero 0.00 EUR  and  isEligible true   =  true
allocationMatch  =      sign
		(
		 @parent . totalCoverageSuggestion Rentegedreven matching.totalCoverageSuggestion undefined   
		)
	 !=  sign
		(
		 deviation 8.851%  
		)
	 and   @parent . totalCoverageSuggestion Rentegedreven matching.totalCoverageSuggestion undefined   !=  zero 0.00 EUR  and  isMatchEligible true   =  undefined
initialCoverageSuggestion  =   default
		(
		 if  allocationMatch undefined  then   @parent . childInitialCoverage  ×  coverageRatio  else  zero   ,  zero 0.00 EUR  
		)
	  =  0.00 EUR
additionalCoverageSuggestion  =   default
		(
		 if   @parent . childAdditionalCoverage Rentegedreven matching.childAdditionalCoverage undefined   !=  zero 0.00 EUR  then   @parent . childAdditionalCoverage  ×  relativeBenchmarkWeight  else  zero   ,  zero 0.00 EUR  
		)
	  =  0.00 EUR
totalCoverageSuggestion  =    initialCoverageSuggestion 0.00 EUR  +  additionalCoverageSuggestion 0.00 EUR   =  0.00 EUR
preCashflowSuggestion  =   totalCoverageSuggestion 0.00 EUR   =  0.00 EUR
cashflowSuggestion  =   preCashflowSuggestion 0.00 EUR   =  0.00 EUR
